title: Effects of the Bhava Lords
structure: 12 lords x 12 houses = 144 placements + 4 miscellaneous slokas (145-148)

claims.claim: 1st lord in 1st → physical felicity, health, strong constitution
Notes: noble descent, ambitious, beautiful, prosper by own efforts
1st lord in 2nd → wealthy, good speech, learned
1st lord in 3rd → brave, no siblings lost, intelligent, happy
Notes: equal to king, respected by others
Notes: may indulge in unnatural sexual gratification
1st lord in 4th → paternal+maternal happiness, many brothers, lustful, virtuous, charming
Notes: noble descent, ambitious, beautiful, prosperity comes easily
1st lord in 5th → mediocre progenic happiness
1st lord in 5th → will lose first child
1st lord in 5th → honourable, given to anger, dear to king
1st lord in 6th + malefic → devoid of physical happiness, troubled by enemies
Exception: Scorpio/Taurus ascendant → felicitous augury for freedom from diseases
Notes: abundant wealth/respect apart from royal status
Notes: more than one marriage or losing spouse early
1st lord in 7th + malefic → wife will not live long
1st lord in 7th + benefic → wander aimlessly, penury, dejected
1st lord in 7th + strong planet → alternatively become king
1st lord in 8th → accomplished scholar
1st lord in 8th → sickly, thievish, gambler, anger, others' wives
Notes: Balarishta/child mortality, repository of misfortunes, poor
Notes: Aries/Libra ascendant → evil results should be avoided/moderated
1st lord in 9th → fortunate, devotee of Vishnu, skilful, eloquent, wife/sons/wealth
Notes: gain abundantly from father, every undertaking fruitful
1st lord in 10th → paternal happiness, royal honour, fame, self-earned wealth
Notes: possess ambitions, prosper in pursuits, obtainment of co-born
1st lord in 11th → gains, good qualities, fame, many wives
1st lord in 12th + no benefic aspect → bereft of physical happiness, spend unfruitfully, anger
Notes: addicted to gambling, debauchery, other vices, wasteful
2nd lord in 1st → endowed with sons and wealth, inimical to family, lustful, hard-hearted
Notes: fraudulent, financial upheavals; not wholly apply to Capricorn ascendant
2nd lord in 2nd → wealthy, proud, two or more wives, bereft of progeny
2nd lord in 3rd → valorous, wise, virtuous, lustful (when related to benefic)
2nd lord in 3rd + related to malefic → heterodox
Notes: ill-related to females, earn through prostitutes, dirty conduct if malefic
2nd lord in 4th → acquire all kinds of wealth
2nd lord in 4th + exalted + conjunct Jupiter → equal to king
Notes: also produce heterodox and questionable character
2nd lord in 5th → native and sons wealthy, intent on earning
Notes: trickery, not kind to others, lustful, prone to lose child prematurely
2nd lord in 6th + benefic → gain wealth through enemies
2nd lord in 6th + malefic → loss through enemies, mutilation of shanks
Notes: severe loss of wealth through thefts/servants, defects of privities
2nd lord in 7th → addicted to others' wives, be a doctor
2nd lord in 7th + malefic conjunction/aspect → questionable character, wife also
Notes: dire malefic → mother of native of questionable character
2nd lord in 8th → abundant land and wealth, limited marital felicity
2nd lord in 8th → bereft of happiness from elder brother
2nd lord in 9th → wealthy, diligent, skilful, sick during childhood, happy later, religious
2nd lord in 10th → libidinous, honourable, learned, many wives, much wealth, bereft of filial happiness
2nd lord in 11th → all kinds of wealth, diligent, honourable, famous
Notes: miseries due to ill-health during childhood, endowed with health over time
2nd lord in 12th → adventurous, devoid of wealth, interested in others' wealth
Notes: if 2+ favourable planets in 12th → actually wealthy
Notes: Aries ascendant exception — Venus in 12th in high dignity → not bad for riches
3rd lord in 1st → self-made wealth, disposed to worship, valorous, intelligent (though devoid of learning)
Notes: lean body, ascendant lord in 3rd → short-tempered, ill-disposed to others
3rd lord in 2nd → corpulent, devoid of valour, not make efforts, happy, eye on others' wealth
Notes: unnatural sexual means, no enthusiasm in undertakings
3rd lord in 3rd → happiness through co-born, wealth, sons, cheerful, extremely happy
3rd lord in 4th → happy, wealthy, intelligent, wicked spouse
3rd lord in 5th → sons, virtuous, formidable wife if conjunct/aspected by malefic
3rd lord in 5th + malefic conjunct/aspect → formidable wife
3rd lord in 6th → inimical to co-born, affluent, not well-disposed to maternal uncle/aunt
Notes: fond of physical mating with maternal aunt (controversial text)
3rd lord in 7th → interested in serving king, not happy during boyhood, unhappy at end of life
Notes: not favourable for independent profession, tendency to steal, legal award like death
3rd lord in 8th → thief, derive livelihood serving others, die at gate of royal palace
3rd lord in 9th → lack paternal bliss, make fortunes through wife, progenic pleasures
Notes: feel miserable despite fortunes/happiness, father will be contemptible
3rd lord in 10th → all kinds of happiness, self-made wealth, interested in wicked females
3rd lord in 11th → always gain in trading, intelligent (not literate), adventurous, serve others
Notes: emaciated body, misunderstandings with others, not a worthy friend
3rd lord in 12th → spend on evil deeds, wicked father, fortunate through female (or wife)
Notes (Ramadayalu): bestow every happiness in life, yet feel miserable. Mars joining 3rd lord spoils co-born prospects
4th lord in 1st → endowed with learning, virtues, ornaments, lands, conveyances, maternal happiness
Notes: incomparable learning in various branches, risk of ancestral property deprivation, may turn ascetic later
4th lord in 2nd → all kinds of wealth, family life, honour, adventurous, cunning
Notes: abundant gains from mother/maternal relatives, self-earned wealth, lust for lucre
4th lord in 3rd → valorous, servants, liberal, virtuous, charitable, self-earned wealth, free from diseases
4th lord in 4th → minister, all kinds of wealth, skilful, virtuous, honourable, learned, happy, well-disposed to spouse
4th lord in 5th → happy, liked by all, devotee of Vishnu, virtuous, honourable, self-earned wealth
4th lord in 6th → devoid of maternal happiness, anger, thief/conjurer, independent action, ill-disposed
Notes: brought up by another female, careless about own matters, litigations over property, sickly mother
4th lord in 7th → high degree of education, sacrifice patrimony, dumb in assembly
Notes: not enjoy paternal properties, not be householder for long, may give up family burdens
4th lord in 8th → devoid of domestic comforts, no parental happiness, equal to neuter
Notes: affect progenic ability, carnally satisfy spouse with difficulty, childhood difficulties, education as obstacle
4th lord in 9th → dear to all, devoted to God, virtuous, honourable, every kind of happiness
4th lord in 10th → royal honours, alchemist, extremely pleased, conquer five senses
Notes: professionally happy, abundant self-made properties, lack maternal happiness if not well placed
4th lord in 11th → fear of secret disease, liberal, virtuous, charitable, helpful
Notes: secret diseases (venereal etc.), sage does not prefer 4th lord here (8th from 4th)
4th lord in 12th → devoid of domestic comforts, vices, foolish, indolent
Notes: complete absence of happiness (paternal), bereft of masculine vigour, mother of doubtful character
5th lord in 1st → scholarly, progenic happiness, miser, crooked, steal others' wealth
Notes: unsteady disposition, though progenic happiness, other exponents warn of unpleasant situation for sons
5th lord in 2nd → many sons and wealth, pater familias, honourable, attached to spouse, famous in world
Notes: Parasara praises very highly — worldwide fame. Example: Indira Gandhi
5th lord in 3rd → attached to co-born, talebearer, miser, interested in own work
Notes: further be an imposter, not helpful to others
5th lord in 4th → happy, maternal happiness, wealth, intelligence, king/minister/preceptor
Notes: long life to mother, prosperity from youth, posh/beautiful house
5th lord in 5th → happy, sons, virtuous, dear to friends (if related to benefic)
5th lord in 5th + malefic → no issues if related to malefic
5th lord in 6th → sons inimical to native OR lose them, acquire adopted/purchased son
Notes: 4 possibilities — (1) inimical sons, (2) loss of children, (3) adopted issue, (4) purchased child
5th lord in 7th → honourable, very religious, progenic happiness, helpful to others
Notes: tall in stature, speak truth, honest dealings, firm disposition
5th lord in 8th → not much progenic happiness, cough/pulmonary disorders, anger, devoid of happiness
5th lord in 9th → prince or equal, author treatises, famous, shine in race
Notes: good augury for writership/authorship/editorship. Example: Adi Sankaracharya
5th lord in 10th → Rajayoga, various pleasures, very famous
Notes: superior material benefits — wealth, position, fame. Best placement for 5th lord. Needs exaltation or dignity ideally.
5th lord in 11th → learned, dear to people, author of treatises, skilful, many sons, wealth
Notes: free from misfortunes, academic achievements abundant, but 11th should be friendly sign for 5th lord
5th lord in 12th → bereft of happiness from own sons, adopted son, loss of children
Notes: all kinds of miseries re children, adoption if Saturn/Mercury rule 5th, grave defects with 5th in 12th (digestion/abdominal)
6th lord in 1st → sickly, famous, inimical to own men, rich, honourable, adventurous, virtuous
Notes: various diseases from rising sign, adverse effects on progeny acquisition. Venus in Taurus particularly gives benefic results
6th lord in 2nd → adventurous, famous among racemen, live in alien countries, skilful speaker, own work
Notes: financial position somewhat shaky, skilful in hoary lore, good health
6th lord in 3rd → anger, bereft of courage, inimical to all co-born, disobedient servants
Notes: 3rd house not served with intelligence, partly deprived of benefits, unsteady disposition
6th lord in 4th → devoid of maternal happiness, intelligent, talebearer, jealous, fickle-minded, very rich
6th lord in 5th → fluctuating finances, enmity with sons, happy, selfish, kind
6th lord in 6th → enmity with group of kinsmen, friendly to others, mediocre wealth
Notes: happiness of conveyances, free from diseases, long life span
6th lord in 7th → deprived of happiness through wedlock, famous, virtuous, honourable, adventurous, wealthy
Notes: deny marital happiness, dissatisfy in progeny, own spouse becomes sworn enemy
6th lord in 8th → sickly, inimical, desire others' wealth, interested in others' wives, impure
Notes: not good for purity of character, ever incurring enmity, eye on others' learning/wealth
6th lord in 9th → trade in wood and stones (or poison), fluctuating professional fortunes
Notes: building construction material dealing, ups and downs in livelihood
6th lord in 10th → well-known, not respectfully disposed to father, happy in foreign countries, gifted speaker
Notes: valorous, learned in Sastras, litigations over ancestral properties, living in foreign place
6th lord in 11th → gain wealth through enemies, virtuous, adventurous, bereft of progenic happiness
Notes: unhappy to some extent, position can deny acquisition of child
6th lord in 12th → spend on vices, hostile to learned people, torture living beings
Notes: questionable morality, intent on deriving sexual pleasures from other females
7th lord in 1st → go to others' wives, wicked, skilful, devoid of courage, windy diseases
Notes: not firm in words, impart courage to others though bereft himself
7th lord in 2nd → many wives, wealth through wife, procrastinating
Notes: corrupt character, addicted to many women, lose wife early, prosperity ascends with marriage
7th lord in 3rd → loss of children, difficulty, living son with great difficulty, possibility of daughter
Notes: loss of children, possibility of daughter (rarely), female child will live long, male children pass away
7th lord in 4th → wife not under his control, fond of truth, intelligent, religious, dental diseases
Notes: wife brilliantly shine with chastity/devotion (Ramadayalu/Chaukambha view contradicts Maharshi)
7th lord in 5th → honourable, all seven principal virtues, delighted, all kinds of wealth
Notes: (1) delay/disappointments in married life (2) severe affliction to progenic indications
7th lord in 6th → sickly wife, inimical to her, anger, devoid of happiness
Notes: reduce general happiness, poor health, wife weak in constitution, coalesce with harlots
7th lord in 7th → happiness through wife, courageous, skilful, intelligent, only windy diseases
Notes: only possible defect is windy diseases (rheumatism, arthritis). Exception: addiction to other females (Venus in Taurus/Libra)
7th lord in 8th → deprived of marital happiness, wife troubled by diseases, devoid of good disposition, will not obey
Notes: spouse liable to afflictions on longevity, marriage may bring pecuniary gains
7th lord in 9th → union with many women, well-disposed to own wife, many undertakings
7th lord in 10th → disobedient wife, religious, wealthy, endowed with sons
7th lord in 11th → gain wealth through wife, less happiness from sons, have daughters
Notes: possibility of losing children, hostile sons, daughters obtained, sons not long-lived
7th lord in 12th → penury, miser, livelihood related to clothes, wife a spendthrift
8th lord in 1st → devoid of physical felicity, suffer from wounds, hostile to gods/brahmins, religious people
8th lord in 2nd → devoid of bodily vigour, little wealth, not regain lost wealth
8th lord in 3rd → devoid of fraternal happiness, indolent, devoid of servants and strength
8th lord in 4th → deprived of mother (lose mother early), devoid of house/lands/happiness, betray friends
Notes: Parasara uses 'child' (shishu) — lose mother in early childhood
8th lord in 5th → dull-witted, limited children, longlived, wealthy
Notes: financial acquisitions unsteady, fluctuating, intentions not recognised as bona fide, no filial bliss
8th lord in 6th → win over enemies, afflicted by diseases in childhood, incur danger through snakes/water
Notes: sureshot success over enemies/litigations, later free from calamities, indicates long span of life
8th lord in 7th → two wives, downfall in business (if malefic conjunct)
Notes: forerunner of difficulties in married life, spouse weak in constitution, uncertainties/dangers, God-fearing outwardly but expert in stealing
8th lord in 8th → longlived. If weak → medium longevity, thief, blameworthy, blame others
Notes: 8th lord should be strong in Shadbala for full span. Exception: Aquarius native with Mercury in 8th in Virgo (exaltation) not same effect
Notes: 8th in own house → spouse of questionable character, but financial help from her
8th lord in 9th → betray religion, heterodox, beget wicked wife, steal others' wealth

Notes: frequent misfortunes, professional adversities, father suffers in longevity, wife of questionable birth, addicted to others' housewives. Gemini exception (Saturn in 9th = Moolatrikona, not these malefic effects)
8th lord in 10th → devoid of paternal bliss, talebearer, bereft of livelihood. If benefic aspect → these evils not mature
Notes: 8th lord in 9th house causes deaths of parents in boyhood. 8th in 10th → all kinds of miseries. If benefic well placed in 10th → not all evil
8th lord in 11th + malefic → devoid of wealth, miserable in boyhood, happy later on, long-lived
Notes: if alone in 11th → not deprive of financial benefits. Taurus ascendant + Jupiter in 11th = not baneful. Scorpio ascendant + Mercury in 11th = highly favourable
8th lord in 12th → spend on evil deeds, short life. If additionally malefic → more so
9th lord in 1st → fortunate/prosperous, honoured by king, virtuous, charming, learned, honoured by public
Notes: very high position, wealth, fame, free from enemies, worthy housewife, free from afflictions. Exception: Scorpio native not enjoy these effects
9th lord in 2nd → scholar, dear to all, wealthy, sensuous, happiness from wife/sons
9th lord in 3rd → fraternal bliss, wealthy, virtuous, charming
9th lord in 4th → houses, conveyances, happiness, all kinds of wealth, devoted to mother
9th lord in 5th → sons, prosperity, devoted to elders, bold, charitable, learned
9th lord in 6th → meagre prosperity, devoid of happiness from maternal relatives, troubled by enemies
9th lord in 7th → happiness after marriage, virtuous, famous
Notes: success in all undertakings, prosperity picks up after marriage, not well disposed to father
9th lord in 8th → not prosperous, no happiness from elder brother
Notes: devoid of fortunes, failures in all undertakings, no professional/financial stability, father's longevity cut, blessing in disguise re patrimony inheritance
9th lord in 9th → abundant fortunes, virtues, beauty, happiness from co-born
Notes: fraternal bliss, own properties large scale, easy success in everything, father plays significant role, nurtured by maternal grandparents
9th lord in 10th → king or minister, virtuous, dear to all
Notes: if prepotent → royal status; strength proportionally decreasing → lesser positions
9th lord in 11th → financial gains day by day, devoted to elders, virtuous, meritorious
Notes: increasing phases of fortunes/prosperity; extremely favourable for material upliftment. Exception: Gemini ascendant + Saturn in 11th = contrary (not apply)
9th lord in 12th → loss of fortunes, always spend on auspicious acts, become poor entertaining guests
Notes: not auspicious for happiness of elder brothers/sisters
10th lord in 1st → scholarly, famous, be a poet, diseases in boyhood, happy later, wealth increases daily
Notes: 10th lord in ascendant = very favourable for riches giving royal status. Example: Sarabhoji Maharaja
10th lord in 2nd → wealthy, virtuous, honoured by king, charitable, happiness from father/others
Notes: immeasurable financial success through profession, large scale patrimony. Example: Morarji Desai
10th lord in 3rd → happiness from brothers/servants, valorous, virtuous, eloquent, truthful
10th lord in 4th → happy, interested in mother's welfare, conveyances, lands, houses, virtuous, wealthy
10th lord in 5th → endowed with all kinds of learning, always delighted, wealthy, endowed with sons
Notes: great asset, number of children, never filial grief, always move among wealthy people. Example: Rabindranath Tagore
10th lord in 6th → bereft of paternal bliss, skilful but bereft of wealth, troubled by enemies
Notes: dire blemish for professional/monetary stability, frequent changes in calling, financial growth severely paralyzed, lasting diseases. Advantage: extreme intelligence
10th lord in 7th → endowed with happiness through wife, intelligent, virtuous, eloquent, truthful, religious
10th lord in 8th → devoid of good acts, longlived, intent on blaming others

Notes: 10th lord denotes potence of longevity, Karmic credit; should be strong in Shadbala. Exception: Gemini ascendant + Jupiter in 8th (fall) = adversely affect longevity. Leo native + Venus (significant beneficiary) in 8th exaltation = long span
10th lord in 9th → born of royal scion, king, equal to king, progenic happiness, wealth
10th lord in 10th → skilful in all jobs, valorous, truthful, devoted to elders
10th lord in 11th → wealth, happiness, sons, virtuous, truthful, always delighted
10th lord in 12th → spend through royal abodes, fear from enemies, skilful but worried
Notes: expenditure through taxes/fines/government, luxurious political expenses, financial troubles through government
11th lord in 1st → genuine, rich, happy, even-sighted, poet, eloquent, endowed with gains
Notes: befriend virtuous, reject evil associations, prosperous after marriage
11th lord in 2nd → all kinds of wealth, accomplishments, charitable, religious, always happy
11th lord in 3rd → skilful in all jobs, wealthy, fraternal bliss, may sometimes incur gout pains
11th lord in 4th → gain from maternal relatives, visits to shrines, happiness of house/lands
11th lord in 5th → children happy/educated/virtuous, himself religious and happy
11th lord in 6th → afflicted by diseases, cruel, living in foreign places, troubled by enemies
Notes: acquisition of diseases augmented, hearing organ defects (Aquarius), deafness, selfish, servitude rather than independent profession, financial reversals
11th lord in 7th → gain through wife's relatives, liberal, virtuous, sensuous, at command of spouse
Notes: look upto and receive help from wife's relatives, affluent, lack wisdom/judgement in expenses, union with others' females, spouse will boss over him
11th lord in 8th → reversals in undertakings, long life, wife predecease him
Notes: increases longevity; Mars in 8th (11th lord for Gemini) bears testimony. Not apply to Leo with Mercury (11th lord) in 8th in debilitation
11th lord in 9th → fortunate, skilful, truthful, honoured by king, affluent
11th lord in 10th → honoured by king, virtuous, attached to religion, truthful, intelligent, subdue senses
Notes: primarily intent on public welfare/redemption, deep into religion, educate public. Example: Sri Bhakti Vedanta Swamiji (ISKCON founder) — Neechabhanga cancellation
11th lord in 11th → gain in all undertakings, learning and happiness increase day by day
11th lord in 12th → expend on good deeds, sensuous, many wives, befriend barbarians/foreigners
12th lord in 1st → spendthrift, weak constitution, phlegmatic disorders, devoid of wealth/learning
Notes: breathing troubles, lung disorders, tuberculosis, many vices, fear of death, undertakings not yield success
12th lord in 2nd → spend on auspicious deeds, religious, speak sweetly, endowed with virtues/happiness
12th lord in 3rd → devoid of fraternal bliss, hate others, promote self-nourishment, quite selfish
12th lord in 4th → devoid of maternal happiness, day by day accrue losses in lands/conveyances/houses
12th lord in 5th → bereft of sons and learning, spend and visit shrines to beget a son
12th lord in 6th → enmity with own men, anger, sinful, miserable, go to others' wives
12th lord in 7th → expenditure on wife, not enjoy conjugal bliss, bereft of learning/strength
12th lord in 8th → always gain, speak affably, medium span of life, all good qualities
Notes: medium life = ~60 years. 12th lord in 8th not contribute to higher bracket of longevity
12th lord in 9th → dishonour elders, inimical even to friends, intent on own ends
12th lord in 10th → expenditure through royal persons, moderate paternal bliss only
12th lord in 11th → incur losses, brought up by others, gain through others sometimes
Notes: obstacles in begetting child, will adopt a child
12th lord in 12th → heavy expenditure only, no physical felicity, iritable, spiteful
MISCELLANEOUS: Planet owning two bhavas → results deduced considering both lordships (same placement)
If contrary results from dual lordship → results are nullified
If varied nature results → planet yields full/half/quarter based on strength being full/medium/negligible
Sun and Moon own one sign each → results cited will come to pass directly
Notes: Example — Saturn in 5th for Pisces: as 11th lord gives children/happiness, as 12th lord denies education. Resolution: Jupiter (5th karaka) and Moon (5th lord) should be checked
